base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_morph_ball_bomb — a projectile (explosive) from 1986 metroid. Morph Ball Bomb — 4-frame expansion. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Morph Ball Bomb — 4-frame expansion; lays small bomb that explodes in 2-3s; can bomb-jump via chained detonations
